text:
(a) A person commits an offense if the person violates a provision of this chapter and no other penalty is prescribed for the violation.

(b) This section does not apply to a violation of Section 502.003 (Registration by Political Subdivision Prohibited) , 502.042 (Title Required for Registration) , 502.197 (Registration by Mail or Electronic Means; Service Charge) , or 502.431 (Fee: Motor Vehicle Used Exclusively to Transport and Spread Fertilizer) .

(c) Unless otherwise specified, an offense under this section is a misdemeanor punishable by a fine not to exceed $200.

Transferred, redesignated and amended from Transportation Code, Section 502.401 by Acts 2011, 82nd Leg., R.S., Ch. 1296 (H.B. 2357 ), Sec. 155, eff. January 1, 2012.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 502. Registration of Vehicles
##### § 502.471 — General Penalty

(a) A person commits an offense if the person violates a provision of this chapter and no other penalty is prescribed for the violation.

(b) This section does not apply to a violation of Section 502.003 (Registration by Political Subdivision Prohibited) , 502.042 (Title Required for Registration) , 502.197 (Registration by Mail or Electronic Means; Service Charge) , or 502.431 (Fee: Motor Vehicle Used Exclusively to Transport and Spread Fertilizer) .

(c) Unless otherwise specified, an offense under this section is a misdemeanor punishable by a fine not to exceed $200.

Transferred, redesignated and amended from Transportation Code, Section 502.401 by Acts 2011, 82nd Leg., R.S., Ch. 1296 (H.B. 2357 ), Sec. 155, eff. January 1, 2012.

subsections.label: c
subsections.text: Unless otherwise specified, an offense under this section is a misdemeanor punishable by a fine not to exceed $200.
Transferred, redesignated and amended from Transportation Code, Section 502.401 by Acts 2011, 82nd Leg., R.S., Ch. 1296 (H.B. 2357 ), Sec. 155, eff. January 1, 2012.
